name: think-it-through
description: A lightweight conversation kit for human-led thinking with AI: steer messy thought, keep its map, and project it into briefs or plans.

interface.shortDescription: Think freely. The agent keeps the map.
interface.longDescription: A zero-config conversation kit for human-led thinking: unload raw ideas, steer the agent with lightweight controls, recover the full map, and project selected thinking into reusable briefs or execution plans.
defaultPrompt: $think-it-through:think-it-through Adopt this conversation and help me think it through.
$think-it-through:think-recap Recover the full shape of this conversation.
$think-it-through:think-to-brief Turn this thinking into a reusable brief.
